descriptions: Replaced non-functional prop animations with over 100+ custom-made animations and unique prop models.
Removed broken shared emotes and introduced 30+ new custom couple animations with verified .ycd files.
Updated the animation converter to support the 'Flag' variable for more advanced animation configuration.
Fixed a bug in the cleanup logic that prevented props from being removed when exiting the Emote Creator.
Integrated bablo_animprops.ytyp via fxmanifest for native custom prop support.
